description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular carton with a peaked top, resembling a classic milk or juice carton. The main color is off-white, with bold red panels and yellow text and graphics. The front panel features handwritten-style text, including dates and the word 'KILM', with a large red area occupying most of the surface. The side panel displays a stylized white cow udder graphic on a red background, while the back and top panels repeat the 'KILM' branding with red and yellow accents. The carton appears to be made of coated paperboard, typical for liquid or snack packaging, and is lightweight and easily portable. There are no visible openings or straws, suggesting it is a sealed package, likely for single-use consumption.
description: A tall, off-white and red carton with yellow handwritten-style text and graphics, resembling a milk or juice snack package.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large red panel with yellow handwritten text, including dates and the word 'KILM'.
description_view_1: Back view displays a red mountain-like graphic with 'KILM' in yellow and horizontal lines below.
description_view_2: Side view features a red panel with a stylized white cow udder graphic and partial yellow text at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite back view mirrors the back, with the red mountain graphic and 'KILM' branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'KILM' appears in yellow handwritten-style text on the front, back, and top panels, serving as a brand mark. No distinct logo graphic is present.
